title: Python for Data Analytics
description: A comprehensive guide to data analytics using Python, covering Pandas, NumPy, visualization, and real-world projects.

title: SQL Mastery
description: From basics to advanced: SQL query optimization, window functions, CTEs, and database design patterns.

title: Power BI: From Data to Dashboard
description: Build production-ready Power BI dashboards with DAX, data modeling, and best practices.

title: Machine Learning Engineering
description: Practical guide to building, deploying, and maintaining ML systems in production environments.

title: Generative AI & LLMs
description: Hands-on guide to building applications with large language models, RAG, and agentic AI systems.

title: Full Stack Development with Next.js
description: Build modern full-stack applications with Next.js, TypeScript, Prisma, and Tailwind CSS.
